# VitaCoat

> VitaCoat is a transparent antimicrobial surface coating for hard, non-porous, high-touch surfaces. It combines citrus bioflavonoids with a durable SiO₂ matrix and is positioned as a supplementary hygienic surface layer that supports hygiene between routine cleaning and disinfection cycles.

## Primary pages
- Home: https://www.vitacoat.eu/
- Applications hub: https://www.vitacoat.eu/applications/
- Documentation hub: https://www.vitacoat.eu/documentation/
- FAQ: https://www.vitacoat.eu/faq/
- Contact: https://www.vitacoat.eu/contact/

- Healthcare: https://www.vitacoat.eu/applications/healthcare/

- Maintenance and reapplication: https://www.vitacoat.eu/maintenance-and-reapplication/

## Important claim boundaries
- VitaCoat supplements routine cleaning and disinfection; it does not replace them.
- VitaCoat is positioned for hard, non-porous surfaces.
- Direct-food-contact approval should not be assumed.
- Project-specific fit should be confirmed through technical review and documentation.

## Preferred contact routes
- Technical review: mailto:technical@vitacoat.no
- Documentation requests: mailto:documents@vitacoat.no
